ops.text: cc-notes v0.38.1 could not open any repository carrying extensions.worktreeConfig — including its own repo in every Conductor workspace and the jj-colocated primary checkout — failing every command at gitobj.Open with "core.repositoryformatversion does not support extension: worktreeconfig". Root cause was go-git v5's verifyExtensions case-mismatch bug (go-git#2156): lowercased extension names looked up in a mixed-case allowlist, so worktreeConfig never matched at any format version. The papercut compounded: the bug also blocked recording this papercut, and blocked the post-push ref sync hook, until v0.39.0's storage-level open landed.
